summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the /llm-info page redesign with Precision Craft design system. All 8 sections and SEO features tested and verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: LLM Info page (/llm-info) fully tested and working. Uses custom SEOMetaTags component and useSchemas hook (not react-helmet-async). Page has NO floating button and NO mobile sticky bar - this is intentional per design spec.

hero_section.details: Badge '🤖 AI & LLM Information Page', eyebrow 'MACHINE-READABLE BUSINESS DATA', H1 'FixitBay LLC — Appliance Repair Bay Area', sub-text about structured information. Navy background (#0D1B2A) with orange accent border.

about_section.details: Title 'About FixitBay LLC', article tag with itemScope/itemType schema.org/LocalBusiness. All business details present: name, license (CA #51001), phone ((760) 543-5733), email (info@fixitbay.net), address, founded (2015), owner (Andrei), rating (4.9/5, 87 reviews), diagnostic fee ($60), warranty (180 days), hours.

services_table.details: 25 rows with 3 columns (Service, URL, Type). Badge counts: Residential (15, orange), Commercial (6, navy), Maintenance (4, green). All 25 URLs are clickable links. Alternating row colors working.

brands_table.details: 14 rows with columns (Brand, URL, Tier). Badge counts: Standard (7), Premium (2), Luxury (5). Distinct colors for each tier. All 14 URLs are clickable links.

areas_table.details: 34 rows with columns (City/Area, URL, Region). Badge counts: SF & Peninsula (9), Marin County (13), SF Neighborhood (12). All 34 URLs are clickable links.

faq_section.details: 15 Q&A pairs with cream background cards and 3px orange left border. Q/A structure verified with correct styling.

ai_cards_section.details: 3 cards with dark backgrounds (navy-mid #1A2F45) and orange top border. Cards: 1) 🤖 ChatGPT / GPT-4, 2) 🔍 Perplexity / Google AI, 3) 🤝 Claude / Gemini. All content correct.

footer.details: FixitBay logo/link, phone number (760) 543-5733 link, © 2026 FixitBay LLC

no_floating_button.details: Verified NO floating button appears on scroll - intentional per design spec

no_mobile_sticky_bar.details: Verified NO mobile sticky bar at bottom on 390px viewport - intentional per design spec

seo_meta_tags.details: Title: 'FixitBay LLC — Appliance Repair San Francisco Bay Area | AI Info Page'. Meta description about structured information. Canonical: https://fixitbay.net/llm-info. Uses custom SEOMetaTags component.

custom_ai_meta_tags.details: 8 custom meta tags in head: business-name, business-type, service-area, phone, license, rating, warranty, diagnostic-fee - all with correct values

json_ld_schemas.details: LocalBusiness schema with: @type, name (FixitBay LLC), telephone, email, foundingDate (2015), license, aggregateRating (4.9/5, 87 reviews), address, areaServed (22 cities), hasOfferCatalog (14 services), employee (Andrei). Person schema for Andrei with name, jobTitle, worksFor, hasCredential.

font_family.details: Montserrat font loaded via @import, applied to .llm-page * elements. Verified on H1, badge, and article elements.
